mapper.sql: detail_id, log_id, trade_id, business_no, trade_type, settle_account, settle_amount, margin_account, margin_amount, result, error_message, created_at
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO fx_scheduled_job_detail (log_id, trade_id, business_no, trade_type, settle_account, settle_amount, margin_account, margin_amount, result, error_message, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.logId}, #{item.tradeId}, #{item.businessNo}, #{item.tradeType}, #{item.settleAccount}, #{item.settleAmount}, #{item.marginAccount}, #{item.marginAmount}, #{item.result}, #{item.errorMessage}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fx_scheduled_job_detail WHERE log_id = #{logId} ORDER BY detail_id ASC
